{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Cost Accountant",
  "description": "Bridgemead HR provides customized HR solutions to optimize workforce productivity and profitability. Our expert trainers design bespoke training programs, innovative HR strategies, and efficient payroll systems tailored to each client&rsquo;s unique needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cost Accountant
Job Location:&nbsp;&nbsp;Ondo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Analyze and report on financial performance. Prepare and review financial statements (e.g., balance sheet, income statement).
	Develop and maintain financial models and forecast. Conduct variance analysis and identify areas for improvement.
	Develop and implement cost accounting systems. Track and analyze direct and indirect costs. Conduct cost-benefit analyses.
	Identify and recommend cost-saving opportunities.
	Develop and Manage Budget. Prepare and review forecasts. Analyze and report on budget variances.
	Conduct sensitive analysis. Develop and implement inventory management systems. Track and analyze inventory levels. Identify and recommend inventory optimization strategies.
	Ensure compliance with accounting standards and regulations. Identify and mitigate financial risks.
	Conduct special studies and analyses. Develop and implement process improvements. Provide financial support for strategic initiatives.
	Supervise and mentor cost accounting staff. Communicate financial results to management.
	Provide financial to non-financial stakeholders. Present financial information to senior management. Collaborate with other departments.


Qualifications &ndash; Cost Accountant


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related field.
	7&ndash;10 years of experience in cost accounting, preferably within agriculture, manufacturing, FMCG, or plantation operations.
	Strong knowledge of costing methods relevant to plantation and processing operations (standard costing, variance analysis, process costing).
	Professional qualification such as ICAN, ACCA, CIMA, or part qualification is an added advantage.
	Experience in budgeting, forecasting, cost control, and inventory valuation across farm, mill, and logistics operations.
	Good understanding of production costing, yield analysis, and efficiency metrics in oil palm operations.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting / ERP systems.
	Strong analytical, reporting, and problem-solving skills.
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.
	Ability to work with cross-functional teams including operations, procurement, and finance.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to:&nbsp;career.bridgemeadnghr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-03-14",

Cost Accountant Job at Bridgemead HR




        
    

        
        Bridgemead HR provides customized HR solutions to optimize workforce productivity and profitability. Our expert trainers design bespoke training programs, innovative HR strategies, and efficient payroll systems tailored to each client’s unique needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cost Accountant
Job Location:  Ondo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Analyze and report on financial performance. Prepare and review financial statements (e.g., balance sheet, income statement).
	Develop and maintain financial models and forecast. Conduct variance analysis and identify areas for improvement.
	Develop and implement cost accounting systems. Track and analyze direct and indirect costs. Conduct cost-benefit analyses.
	Identify and recommend cost-saving opportunities.
	Develop and Manage Budget. Prepare and review forecasts. Analyze and report on budget variances.
	Conduct sensitive analysis. Develop and implement inventory management systems. Track and analyze inventory levels. Identify and recommend inventory optimization strategies.
	Ensure compliance with accounting standards and regulations. Identify and mitigate financial risks.
	Conduct special studies and analyses. Develop and implement process improvements. Provide financial support for strategic initiatives.
	Supervise and mentor cost accounting staff. Communicate financial results to management.
	Provide financial to non-financial stakeholders. Present financial information to senior management. Collaborate with other departments.


Qualifications – Cost Accountant


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related field.
	7–10 years of experience in cost accounting, preferably within agriculture, manufacturing, FMCG, or plantation operations.
	Strong knowledge of costing methods relevant to plantation and processing operations (standard costing, variance analysis, process costing).
	Professional qualification such as ICAN, ACCA, CIMA, or part qualification is an added advantage.
	Experience in budgeting, forecasting, cost control, and inventory valuation across farm, mill, and logistics operations.
	Good understanding of production costing, yield analysis, and efficiency metrics in oil palm operations.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting / ERP systems.
	Strong analytical, reporting, and problem-solving skills.
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.
	Ability to work with cross-functional teams including operations, procurement, and finance.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: career.bridgemeadnghr@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Logistics Head",
  "description": "Aquila introduced the finance lease product at the origination of the company in 2005 and has since then developed tailor-made solutions for its diverse customer segments. The product is offered to retail clients (both individually and via associations and cooperatives schemes), small and medium- sized enterprises and small corporate.

An active collaboration of the agency is required to structure the transaction and ensure prevention of over-indebtedness by implementing checks on the client&rsquo;s disposable income. To facilitate repayments, these are made directly from source.

This innovative scheme has so far provided access to equipment finance to close to 25,000 Nigerians. Typical assets which Aquila finances under this scheme are motorcycles, tricycles, laptops, refrigerators, freezers, and generators which support the generation of additional income to supplement the incomes of lower-ranking Nig.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Head

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
Coordinate and supervise Logistic Function(s):


	Ensure smooth running of the Logistics function with proper delegation and monitoring of task in line with corporate strategic&nbsp;objectives, and total compliance to corporate governance and good ethical practice


KYC verification of Drivers and their Surety:


	To ensure full capture of all existing drivers,&nbsp;verification and validation of identity, residence and past work records, and surety&#39;s details
	Ability to track down any particular driver and surety as at when required.


Recruitment of Drivers, Drivers documentation and licensing:


	To ensure all drivers have&nbsp;the legal requirement to drive vehicles, up to date driver&rsquo;s license and test certificate
	To track the genuineness and validity of drivers documentations required by law to driver across Nigeria/ and enforcement of drivers undertaken to be sign whenever there is an&nbsp;update required


Training and retraining of drivers:


	Ensure drivers under go Aquila&#39;s and contract driving certification test, with other test from drivers institute (Oshodi Lagos) / Road safety to provide stand by drivers in pool


Preparation of Drivers payroll:


	Timely preparation of drivers payroll and charge against drivers pay, with no errors, omission or ghost workers


Drivers&#39; outsourcing management:


	To ensure the effective and regular evaluation of the performances of engaged drivers in line with their terms of engagement. the welfare and&nbsp;training of the drivers for effectiveness on their jobs


Client services:


	To provide excellent service to Aquila clients who engage the services of the outsourced drivers


Corporate Governance and Risk Management:


	To ensure the development and implementation of processes and systems that will contribute to good Corporate&nbsp;Governance. (This include remittance of all statutory return, and documentations)


Performance management:


	To ensure the effective and regular evaluation of organisational performance, and to ensure that those targets set in relevant strategic plans&nbsp;are met.
	To ensure that corrective actions are taken in those instances were targets are not&nbsp;met
	To ensure the timely availability of the quarterly performance report. The focus should be on&nbsp;strategic progress, but Management of Aquila Leasing should also be alerted to changes&nbsp;within the strategic landscape
	Monthly strategy meetings.


Salary
N250,000 - N370,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to:&nbsp;humancapital@aquilagroupng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Logistics Head Job at Aquila




        
    

        
        Aquila introduced the finance lease product at the origination of the company in 2005 and has since then developed tailor-made solutions for its diverse customer segments. The product is offered to retail clients (both individually and via associations and cooperatives schemes), small and medium- sized enterprises and small corporate.

An active collaboration of the agency is required to structure the transaction and ensure prevention of over-indebtedness by implementing checks on the client’s disposable income. To facilitate repayments, these are made directly from source.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



This innovative scheme has so far provided access to equipment finance to close to 25,000 Nigerians. Typical assets which Aquila finances under this scheme are motorcycles, tricycles, laptops, refrigerators, freezers, and generators which support the generation of additional income to supplement the incomes of lower-ranking Nig.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Head

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
Coordinate and supervise Logistic Function(s):


	Ensure smooth running of the Logistics function with proper delegation and monitoring of task in line with corporate strategic objectives, and total compliance to corporate governance and good ethical practice


KYC verification of Drivers and their Surety:


	To ensure full capture of all existing drivers, verification and validation of identity, residence and past work records, and surety's details
	Ability to track down any particular driver and surety as at when required.


Recruitment of Drivers, Drivers documentation and licensing:


	To ensure all drivers have the legal requirement to drive vehicles, up to date driver’s license and test certificate
	To track the genuineness and validity of drivers documentations required by law to driver across Nigeria/ and enforcement of drivers undertaken to be sign whenever there is an update required


Training and retraining of drivers:


	Ensure drivers under go Aquila's and contract driving certification test, with other test from drivers institute (Oshodi Lagos) / Road safety to provide stand by drivers in pool


Preparation of Drivers payroll:


	Timely preparation of drivers payroll and charge against drivers pay, with no errors, omission or ghost workers


Drivers' outsourcing management:


	To ensure the effective and regular evaluation of the performances of engaged drivers in line with their terms of engagement. the welfare and training of the drivers for effectiveness on their jobs


Client services:


	To provide excellent service to Aquila clients who engage the services of the outsourced drivers


Corporate Governance and Risk Management:


	To ensure the development and implementation of processes and systems that will contribute to good Corporate Governance. (This include remittance of all statutory return, and documentations)


Performance management:


	To ensure the effective and regular evaluation of organisational performance, and to ensure that those targets set in relevant strategic plans are met.
	To ensure that corrective actions are taken in those instances were targets are not met
	To ensure the timely availability of the quarterly performance report. The focus should be on strategic progress, but Management of Aquila Leasing should also be alerted to changes within the strategic landscape
	Monthly strategy meetings.


Salary
N250,000 - N370,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: humancapital@aquilagroupng.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Restaurant Cashier Job at the Place - Smackers Limited




        
    

        
        The Place is a fast growing, world class, and dynamic, multi-billion Nigerian conglomerates, established and managed by a team of professionals with decades of management consulting and accounting experience/ training from Arthur Andersen (now KPMG in Nigeria). We are a profitable player in the QSR sector of the Hospitality industry in Nigeria with great prospects and staff strength of over 1000 employees. Currently, our operations span across 17 locations in Lagos and Abuja, Nigeria, with rapid expansion plans to penetrate more locations in the short to medium term.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Restaurant Cashier

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Description


	We are currently looking for versatile, intelligent and energetic restaurant cashiers with passion for delivering outstanding service to join our professional and friendly team.
	This person will be responsible for providing passionate, charming and attentive service delivery to all customers according to our service standards in order to ensure guest satisfaction.


Job Summary


	As the Restaurant Cashier, you will work alongside team members in ensuring customers have a wonderful experience, deliver quality service and maintaining relationships with customers.


Key Responsibilities


	Ensures customers are attended to in a courteous and friendly manner and swift resolution is given to their issues/complaints
	Ensures sales entries are correctly entered and receipts are issued to customer
	Maintain excellent level of hygiene at all the time
	Must be knowledgeable about the company products
	Must possess suggestive selling skills


Qualifications


	Minimum of SSCE
	Maximum of OND
	Experience in the hospitality industry could be an added advantage but not compulsory
	Must be between 18-25 years old
	Must be able to work in a team environment
	Must reside in or be able to work in Lekki and VI.


Note: Candidates who do not meet the above criteria and does not agree with the terms and condition need not apply.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "General Manager (Catering Company)",
  "description": "At Elvaridah, we emphasize on the critical matters and prospects of organizations such as business growth, strategy, planning, marketing, structure, and people management across different industries. We help companies focus on the growth of their businesses while aligning costs with strategy. With our all-inclusive approach and expertise, we capture values across the boundaries of any organization. Elvaridah focuses on optimizing all the different parts of a business as a unit.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;General Manager (Catering Company)

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Managing Director / CEO

Role Summary


	The General Manager is responsible for the overall leadership, strategic direction, operational efficiency, and profitability of the catering company.
	The role oversees event execution, kitchen operations, business development, financial performance, and team management.


Key Responsibilities
Strategic Leadership:


	Develop and implement business growth strategies.
	Set revenue targets and performance goals.
	Identify market expansion opportunities.


Operational Oversight:


	Supervise kitchen operations, logistics, and event execution.
	Ensure quality control across all catering services.
	Oversee procurement, vendor management, and supply chain.


Financial Management:


	Prepare and manage annual budgets.
	Monitor cash flow, expenses, and profitability.
	Approve major expenditures and contracts.


Business Development &amp; Client Relations:


	Build and maintain key corporate and private client relationships.
	Negotiate contracts and high-value deals.
	Oversee proposals and event costing.


Team Leadership:


	Recruit, train, and supervise departmental heads.
	Implement performance management systems.
	Foster accountability and productivity across teams.


Compliance &amp; Risk Management:


	Ensure compliance with food safety regulations.
	Implement risk mitigation strategies.
	Oversee insurance, licenses, and statutory requirements.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Hospitality, or related fields
	6 - 10 years of experience in catering/event management.
	Strong financial and operational management expertise.
	Proven leadership and business development track record.
	Excellent negotiation and decision-making skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@elvaridah.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

General Manager (Catering Company) Job at Elvaridah




        
    

        
        At Elvaridah, we emphasize on the critical matters and prospects of organizations such as business growth, strategy, planning, marketing, structure, and people management across different industries. We help companies focus on the growth of their businesses while aligning costs with strategy. With our all-inclusive approach and expertise, we capture values across the boundaries of any organization. Elvaridah focuses on optimizing all the different parts of a business as a unit.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager (Catering Company)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Managing Director / CEO

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The General Manager is responsible for the overall leadership, strategic direction, operational efficiency, and profitability of the catering company.
	The role oversees event execution, kitchen operations, business development, financial performance, and team management.


Key Responsibilities
Strategic Leadership:


	Develop and implement business growth strategies.
	Set revenue targets and performance goals.
	Identify market expansion opportunities.


Operational Oversight:


	Supervise kitchen operations, logistics, and event execution.
	Ensure quality control across all catering services.
	Oversee procurement, vendor management, and supply chain.


Financial Management:


	Prepare and manage annual budgets.
	Monitor cash flow, expenses, and profitability.
	Approve major expenditures and contracts.


Business Development & Client Relations:


	Build and maintain key corporate and private client relationships.
	Negotiate contracts and high-value deals.
	Oversee proposals and event costing.


Team Leadership:


	Recruit, train, and supervise departmental heads.
	Implement performance management systems.
	Foster accountability and productivity across teams.


Compliance & Risk Management:


	Ensure compliance with food safety regulations.
	Implement risk mitigation strategies.
	Oversee insurance, licenses, and statutory requirements.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Hospitality, or related fields
	6 - 10 years of experience in catering/event management.
	Strong financial and operational management expertise.
	Proven leadership and business development track record.
	Excellent negotiation and decision-making skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@elvaridah.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
